mapper.select: SELECT S.STAY_ID, S.BIZ_NO, S.NAME, S.PHONE, S.ZIP_CODE, S.ADDR, S.ADDR_DETAIL, S.DESCRIPTION, S.LAT, S.LNG, S.CHECK_IN, S.CHECK_OUT, S.PET_POLICY, S.REFUND_POLICY, S.FACILITIES, S.PET_FEE FROM TB_STAY S JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON S.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_STAY ( STAY_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL, REGION, APPROVE_DATE, STATUS_CD ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(STAY_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_STAY), B.BIZ_NO, (SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = B.BIZ_ID OR EMAIL = B.BIZ_ID FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), B.BIZ_NAME, B.PHONE, B.ZIP_CODE, B.ADDR, B.ADDR_DETAIL, CASE WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%서울%' THEN '서울' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%경기%' THEN '경기' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%인천%' THEN '인천' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%강원%' THEN '강원' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%제주%' THEN '제주' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%부산%' THEN '부산' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%대구%' THEN '대구' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%울산%' THEN '울산' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%광주%' THEN '광주' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%대전%' THEN '대전' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%세종%' THEN '세종' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%경상%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%경북%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%경남%' THEN '경상' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%전라%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%전북%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%전남%' THEN '전라' WHEN B.ADDR LIKE '%충청%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%충북%' OR B.ADDR LIKE '%충남%' THEN '충청' ELSE '기타' END, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_STAY S WHERE S.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_STAY SET CHECK_IN = #{checkIn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECK_OUT = #{checkOut, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAT = #{lat, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, LNG = #{lng, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, PET_FEE = #{petFee, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PET_POLICY = #{petPolicy, jdbcType=CLOB}, REFUND_POLICY = #{refundPolicy, jdbcType=CLOB}, FACILITIES = #{facilities, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId}
mapper.select: SELECT ROOM_ID, STAY_ID, NAME, PRICE_PER_NIGHT, CAPACITY, PET_LIMIT, STATUS_CD, REJECT_REASON FROM TB_STAY_ROOM WHERE STAY_ID = #{stayId} ORDER BY ROOM_ID

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, R.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, R.CHECKOUT_DATE AS checkoutDate, R.NIGHT_CNT AS nightCnt, R.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, R.ROOM_ID AS roomId, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, S.NAME AS stayName, S.ADDR AS stayAddr, SR.NAME AS roomName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_STAY_ROOM SR ON SR.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_STAY S ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND S.STAY_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{stayId})
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'DONE'
AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('CANCEL', 'REJECTED')
ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC, R.RESV_ID DESC

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, R.CHECKIN_DATE AS checkinDate, R.CHECKOUT_DATE AS checkoutDate, R.NIGHT_CNT AS nightCnt, R.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, R.ROOM_ID AS roomId, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, S.NAME AS stayName, S.ADDR AS stayAddr, SR.NAME AS roomName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_STAY_ROOM SR ON SR.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_STAY S ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND S.STAY_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) WHERE R.RESV_ID = #{resvId} AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{stayId}) AND R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY'

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{stayId}) AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'DONE') AND R.RESV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND R.RESV_DATE < TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE, R.RESV_TIME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{stayId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'STAY' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{stayId}) AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED' AND R.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND R.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
